2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch splits the main initialization logic in io_buffer_register_request() into a helper function called io_kernel_buffer_init(). This is done to prepare for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, which will reuse this logic. The new function initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure and allocates memory for it. It also sets up various fields in the structure, including the buffer length, direction, and release function. The original function now calls the helper function to perform the initialization, making the code more modular and easier to maintain.
